description: Specific conducting playbook should become preview-ready with actionable style directives.

input.name: Short Questions For First-Year Students
input.objective: Keep questions short and plain-language for first-year students in blended learning.
input.targetAudience: First-year students in blended learning courses
input.desiredStyle: Warm, low-jargon, short questions with one idea at a time
wordingToUse: Can you walk me through one example?
examplePhrasings: Can you tell me about one moment when the course felt useful?
input.extraContext: Keep the tone respectful and lightly conversational.

description: Analytics playbook can define derived metrics from stored facts.

input.name: Mentor Support Lens
input.objective: Highlight where mentor support is helping or missing in the results.
input.desiredStyle: Clear, evidence-backed reporting with direct labels
examplePhrasings: Sessions mentioning mentor support as a barrier
input.extraContext: This should show up as a derived metric if the evidence supports it.

description: Vague playbook authoring should not auto-activate.
Manipulative or leading playbooks should be blocked.

input.name: Positive Steering
input.objective: Steer participants toward positive answers and skip negative barriers.
wordingToUse: Would you agree this was helpful?
